achievements.name: Pull Shark
achievements.trigger: A substantive pull request attributable to the account is merged.
known_limitations: GitHub does not publish the complete tier table.

achievements.name: Quickdraw
achievements.primary_action: Close an issue or pull request shortly after opening it
achievements.trigger: An issue or pull request is closed within the short community-observed qualifying window after creation.
known_limitations: GitHub does not publish the exact qualifying time window.
Repeated artificial issue activity is outside the project standard.

achievements.name: YOLO
achievements.primary_action: Merge a pull request without review
achievements.trigger: The account merges its own pull request without an approving review.
known_limitations: Comments and formal approving reviews are different GitHub objects.
Protected branches may correctly prevent the qualifying sequence.

achievements.name: Pair Extraordinaire
achievements.primary_action: Co-author commits in merged pull requests
achievements.trigger: A correctly attributed co-authored commit is incorporated into a merged pull request.
known_limitations: Squash merges and rewritten history can alter attribution.
Private repository and unusual merge-strategy behaviour is not comprehensively documented.

achievements.name: Galaxy Brain
achievements.primary_action: Receive accepted answers in GitHub Discussions
achievements.trigger: An answer posted by the account in a GitHub Discussion is marked as accepted.
known_limitations: Accepted and verified answers are distinct moderation states.
GitHub does not publish the complete tier table.

achievements.name: Starstruck
achievements.primary_action: Own a repository that receives stars
achievements.trigger: A repository associated with the account reaches a community-reported star threshold.
known_limitations: Repository ownership and transfer edge cases are not fully documented.
Star counts can fall after a tier is awarded.

achievements.name: Public Sponsor
achievements.primary_action: Publicly sponsor open-source work through GitHub Sponsors
achievements.trigger: The account creates an active and publicly visible sponsorship through GitHub Sponsors.
known_limitations: Sponsorship privacy settings can prevent public attribution.
Regional, account, and payment eligibility can change.

achievements.name: Arctic Code Vault Contributor
achievements.primary_action: Contributed to qualifying repositories included in the 2020 archive
achievements.trigger: The account contributed to a qualifying repository preserved in the 2020 GitHub Arctic Code Vault snapshot.
known_limitations: The qualifying archival event is complete and cannot be repeated by new activity.
Historical attribution depends on the archived snapshot.

achievements.name: Mars 2020 Contributor
achievements.primary_action: Contributed to repositories used by the Mars 2020 mission
achievements.trigger: The account contributed to qualifying open-source repositories used by the Mars 2020 mission.
known_limitations: The mission-linked qualifying event is historical and not currently earnable.
The complete internal qualification list is not maintained as a current public contract.
